title: Division Network Crisis
summary: The nationwide SHD Network failure and Washington distress call that draw Division Agents to the capital at the beginning of The Division 2.

claims.text: The Division 2 crisis begins several months after the events of the first game.
The nationwide Division Network goes down and Agents receive a distress call.
Agents across the country are summoned to Washington to restore the network.

paragraphs.text: A nationwide network failure converts the Washington emergency into an SHD-wide mission and brings Agents from across the country to the capital.

timeline.label: Several months later — the nationwide SHD Network goes down

verification.notes: Exact mission-by-mission chronology will be added after a base-campaign mission inventory.
